title: break
text: break Set or clear a break point Break { Module } { Line } Break { Module } : { Line } Arguments Module —name of a global ProcScript, function, operation, or an internally-generated label. If omitted, the current module is assumed. Line —logical line number in Module ; if omitted, the first line is assumed. Description The debugger is invoked when the named line is reached in the specified module. If both Module and Line are omitted, the current breakpoint is cleared. Example: Set a breakpoint at the second line in the GP_STORE global ProcScript module: b Gp_store 2 Copy Other examples: break y2 4 b gp_store 15 break Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
